name: emw-warp-mtools
help:
Warp/MTools wrapper to create a population, add a data source, and define a species in one step. Runs: create_population, create_source, create_species.

*REFERENCES*:
[[https://warpem.github.io/warp/reference/mtools/api/mtools/?h=mtools][MTools API]]

params.label: Create new population
params.name: new_population
params.help: Create a new population or input an existing population file.

params.name: create_population.name
params.label: Population name:
params.help: Required (-n, --name). Name of the new population. The .population file will be <directory>/<name>.population

params.name: warp_folder
params.label: Previous WARP run:
params.help: Select the folder of the previous WARP run to use the settings and frame/tilt series from that run. Required only if creating a new population.

params.name: input_population
params.label: Input population:
params.help: Path to an existing population file.

params.name: create_source.name
params.label: Source name:
params.help: Name of the new data source, if empty will be the same as the population name.

params.name: create_source.nframes
params.label: Max tilts/frames:
params.help: Maximum number of tilts or frames to use in refinements (--nframes). Leave 0 or empty to use the maximum available.

params.name: create_source.files
params.label: Files (STAR, optional):
params.help: Optional (--files). STAR file with a list of files to intersect with the full list of frame or tilt series referenced by the settings.

params.name: create_species.name
params.label: Species name:
params.help: Required (-n, --name). Name of the new species.

params.name: create_species.sym
params.label: Symmetry:
params.help: Point symmetry (-s, --sym). E.g. C1, D7, O. Default: C1.

params.name: create_species.particles_relion
params.label: Particles (RELION _data.star):
params.help: Path to ${RELION_PREFIX}_data.star particle metadata from RELION (--particles_relion). It is expected to have the same particle names as the half-maps.

params.name: create_species.mask
params.label: Mask:
params.help: Required (-m, --mask). Path to a tight binary mask file. M will automatically expand and smooth it based on current resolution.

params.name: create_species.angpix_resample
params.label: Resample pixel size (Å/px):
params.help: Resample half-maps and masks to this pixel size (--angpix_resample).

params.name: create_species.lowpass
params.label: Low-pass filter (Å):
params.help: Optional (--lowpass). Low-pass filter in Angstrom, applied to both half-maps.

params.name: extra_create_species
params.label: Extra arguments
params.help:
Extra arguments to pass to create_species. Example:

*--angpix* Override pixel size value found in half-maps, if empty will use map header.

params.name: gpus
params.label: Fixed one GPU
params.help: Hidden parameter to force the use of a single GPU.
